parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant BeanShellExtension
participant BeanShellExtensionUI
participant BeanShellMenu
participant BeanShellMacroAction
participant BeanShellMacrosUI
participant BeanShellMacroController
participant BSInterpreter

User -> BeanShellExtension : openBSext()
BeanShellExtension -> BeanShellExtensionUI : create(this, uicontroller)
BeanShellExtensionUI -> BeanShellMenu : openBSmenu(uicontroller)
BeanShellMenu -> BeanShellMacroAction : open(uicontroller)
BeanShellMacroAction -> BeanShellMacrosUI : create()
BeanShellMacrosUI -> BeanShellMacroController : create()
BeanShellMacroController -> BSInterpreter : create()
User -> BeanShellMacrosUI : write expressions
User -> BeanShellMacrosUI : execute expressions
BeanShellMacrosUI -> BeanShellMacroController : getInterpreter().executeMacro(exp.toString());
@enduml
```
